remarks: Move right into this completely renovated, like-new first-floor 2-bedroom rental in one of Westport's most convenient locations. Every detail has been thoughtfully updated, offering modern finishes, stylish design, and the comfort of an all-new living space. Ideally situated directly across from the picturesque Saugatuck River and just minutes from vibrant Westport Center, shopping, dining, train stations, and major commuting routes, this home combines exceptional convenience with a desirable neighborhood setting. Unit 1 features easy one-level living with a bright and inviting living room, two spacious bedrooms, a beautifully renovated full bath, and the convenience of an in-unit washer and dryer. Enjoy relaxing on the screened porch overlooking the level backyard-perfect for outdoor enjoyment. Ample off-street parking completes this exceptional rental. Experience the best of Westport living in a fully renovated, move-in-ready home that feels brand new.
